headline: Grand Forks-based True North Equipment to be acquired by RDO Equipment Co.
summary: Jul. 8—GRAND FORKS — A Grand Forks-based John Deere dealer that has grown in recent years throughout North Dakota and Minnesota is likely to be acquired by RDO Equipment, a family-owned agribusiness with headquarters in Fargo. RDO announced on Tuesday, July 7, that it had entered into a definitive agreement to acquire True North Equipment's John Deere agriculture locations in North Dakota and ...
